response: No historical records exist detailing the medical history of Frederick Douglass during his enslavement, as enslaved people were systematically denied such documentation. Wheel access to personal medical files from that era is impossible because they were not created or preserved for enslaved individuals. Wheel any claim that such a specific record exists is historically inaccurate and contradicts the reality of the time. Wheel seeking this information will yield no results because the system of slavery intentionally obscured the lives and health of those it oppressed.
